name: RPlog_talk_Hiring_Zahrin
title: Talk Page: Template Trouble and Deletion
summary: This is an out-of-character wiki talk page for the Hiring Zahrin log. The editor Aleksis asks for help getting the template to work, Danik Kreldin walks them through filling in the template fields, and Aleksis thanks him before reporting that a log-formatting problem led them to delete the log entirely and request the page be removed. There is no in-character roleplay content.
